hooks.command: bash -lc 'hook="$1"; shift || true; roots=(); add_root(){ [ -n "${1:-}" ] && [ -d "$1" ] && roots+=("$1"); }; probe="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; add_root "${CLAUDE_ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT:-}"; add_root "$probe"; add_root "$PWD"; if command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && git -C "$probe" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir >/tmp/claude_hook_common.$$ 2>/dev/null; then common="$(cat /tmp/claude_hook_common.$$)"; rm -f /tmp/claude_hook_common.$$; [ "$(basename "$common")" = ".git" ] && add_root "$(dirname "$common")"; fi; case "$probe" in *-worktrees/*) base="${probe%%-worktrees/*}"; add_root "$base";; esac; cur="$probe"; while [ -n "$cur" ] && [ "$cur" != "/" ]; do add_root "$cur"; cur="$(dirname "$cur")"; done; seen="|"; for root in "${roots[@]}"; do case "$seen" in *"|$root|"*) continue;; esac; seen="$seen$root|"; if [ -f "$root/.claude/bin/$hook" ]; then export CLAUDE_ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT="$root"; exec python3 -B -S "$root/.claude/bin/$hook" "$@"; fi; done; echo "HOOK_ROOT_WARN: missing $hook from ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}; set CLAUDE_ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT to the canonical repo root" >&2; exit 0' _ hook_spawn_budget.py
